proposal1.heroHeadline: Innovategroup is losing $300,000 yearly on proposal writing. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Your team spends hours manually drafting proposals for your services. Our AI does it in 47 seconds, tailored and branded.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are the continuous financial drains Innovategroup faces.

problems.title: Wasted Hours
problems.description: Innovategroup spends 2,000 hours annually crafting proposals. That's 2,000 hours not spent closing new deals and servicing clients.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Every delayed proposal loses momentum. This results in an estimated 10% drop in conversion rate, costing thousands in potential revenue.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manual proposals risk brand misalignment. Every inconsistency can confuse clients, risking a 5% churn increase.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled employees for proposal writing is burning $100,000 a year. This is labor not maximized for strategic tasks.

problems.title: Error Prone
problems.description: Manual processes lead to errors. Each mistake costs time to correct and damages credibility, risking at least $50,000 in lost trust.

problems.title: Inefficiency
problems.description: Innovategroup's current method is slow and cumbersome, causing delays that extend closing cycles by 20%, bleeding potential income.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system transforms and replaces all these costly inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals are crafted manually, taking hours. Our system does it in 47 seconds with precision and branding.

solutions.title: Brand Consistency
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk brand inconsistency. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with your brand.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: Currently, high labor costs are tied to proposal writing. Our system slashes these costs, freeing up resources for growth.

solutions.title: Error Elimination
solutions.description: Manual processes are error-prone. Our AI minimizes errors, enhancing credibility and client trust.

solutions.title: Enhanced Conversion
solutions.description: Slow proposals lose deals. Our system's speed increases conversion rates, boosting your bottom line.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Innovategroup's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Innovategroup around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Innovategroup.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Revitalize Acme Corp's Growth with Innovategroup's Expertise.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will implement targeted strategies to enhance your market presence, driving measurable results.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing significant revenue losses due to these challenges.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without converting is revenue walking out the door. This is causing an estimated 20% drop in potential sales monthly.

problems.title: High Customer Churn
problems.description: Losing existing customers is costing Acme Corp around 15% of its annual revenue. Retaining customers is more cost-effective than acquiring new ones.

problems.title: Ineffective Marketing
problems.description: Current marketing strategies are underperforming, leading to a 25% shortfall in expected quarterly performance targets.

problems.title: Brand Visibility Decline
problems.description: A 30% reduction in brand recognition over the past year is leading to missed opportunities in capturing new market segments.

problems.title: Outdated Technology
problems.description: Using outdated systems is leading to inefficiencies and a 10% increase in operational costs annually.

problems.title: Weak Online Engagement
problems.description: A lack of engagement on digital platforms is resulting in a 15% decrease in potential customer interactions each quarter.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Innovategroup offers tailored solutions to address each of these losses effectively.

solutions.title: Digital Marketing Strategy
solutions.description: We will overhaul your marketing campaigns to increase engagement and conversions. Expect improved ROI on your marketing spend.

solutions.title: Technology Upgrade
solutions.description: We will modernize your systems to reduce inefficiencies, cutting operational costs and improving productivity.

solutions.title: Customer Retention Program
solutions.description: Our strategies will enhance customer loyalty, reducing churn and stabilizing your revenue.

solutions.title: Brand Revitalization
solutions.description: We will boost your brand's visibility through strategic positioning, capturing new market segments.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Innovategroup stands out as the strategic partner Acme Corp needs.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Success
whyUsCards.description: Our track record in transforming businesses speaks for itself with numerous satisfied clients.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize your goals, ensuring our strategies align with your vision for success.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: Our team is dedicated to bringing cutting-edge solutions that drive tangible results.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Decisions
whyUsCards.description: We leverage data to inform our strategies, ensuring optimal outcomes for your business.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our team is committed to guiding Acme Corp to success.

team.name: there
team.bio: As Executive Director, I lead our strategic initiatives and nurture client relationships to ensure success.
